metadata.source_txt: all MCQs from Romanian to English google gemini-2 5-flash-lite-preview-09-2025 -batch -proofed.txt
metadata.first_question_preview: Within evolutionary algorithms, the goal of evolution is:
metadata.assignment_note: Inferred from segment count/content because translated all-in-one TXT contains no filename headers.

questions.question: Within evolutionary algorithms, the goal of evolution is:

answers.a: Obtaining individuals better adapted to the environment

questions.question: In the classic problem-solving model, the three elements are: input data, transformation model, output data. Which of the following is not a problem class:

answers.a: Balancing problems: only the transformation model is known

questions.question: Which of the following stages of evolutionary algorithms can also be carried out deterministically:
The scenario used for simulating evolutionary processes within evolutionary algorithms is:

answers.a: Environment with limited resources, maintained at a constant level

questions.question: Which of the following is not a standard element of evolutionary algorithms:
To guarantee obtaining the optimal solution, within the hillclimbing algorithm:

answers.a: Obtaining the optimal solution cannot be guaranteed

questions.question: Which of the following statements is incorrect:

answers.a: The individual evolves to adapt to the environment (this is correct)
answers.b: The population size must be fixed
answers.c: Selection operators act upon the population
answers.d: The population evolves to adapt to the environment
answers.e: The individual is a static element; it does not evolve

questions.question: Representation using binary strings within genetic algorithms:

answers.a: is natural for problems whose solution represents a string of Boolean decisions

questions.question: What arity does the recombination operator have in genetic algorithms (how many operands does it use)?
For problems where permutation representation signifies the order of occurrence of certain events, the recombination operator used is:
To preserve common relationships from parent chromosomes, the recombination operator used is:
The one-point crossover operator can be used in the case of representation by:

answers.a: integer strings, real number strings, binary strings

questions.question: In the case of integer string representation, arithmetic recombinations:

answers.a: can be applied if the results are rounded

questions.question: Which of the following statements is not true for the generational model?

answers.a: It does not take into account chromosome quality
answers.b: It can partially replace the current generation
answers.c: It can completely replace the current generation
answers.d: It can replace a single chromosome from the current population
answers.e: It requires tracking several consecutive generations (CORRECT)

questions.question: Which of the following is not a selection mechanism?
Which of the following is a disadvantage of using the FPS type selection probability distribution?
Which of the following is not a probability distribution model used for the selection stage?
